summary: Implemented the US-844 domain scoring/result model for bullet, mountain, mutual whists, deal-result preview, bullet-target completion, and deterministic final settlement ranking. Deal-settlement states now carry structured result data without mutating score totals until settleDeal, next-deal and finished states preserve the settled result payload, and finished bullets expose a final ranking derived deterministically from bullet, mountain, and net whists. The whist/final-settlement behavior follows the explicit MVP contract decision from MZ-401 rather than claiming exact DOS-authentic formulas. Focused scoring, engine, rule-flow, and persistence tests passed, and the full npm run verify suite passed with 120 tests plus a production build.

tests_run.evidence: 35 domain scoring/engine tests passed after the red-green cycle locked the new result model and settlement behavior.
5 rule-flow integration tests passed, covering settlement transitions and bullet completion flow.
30 persistence tests passed, confirming save/load compatibility still accepts the updated runtime state shape.
Vitest: 12 files, 120 tests passed. Build: tsc and vite build completed successfully.

downstream_notes: Whist and final-settlement formulas are implemented as the explicit MVP scoring contract from docs/test-design/us-844-bullet-scoring.md, not as proven exact DOS-authentic reverse-engineering results. Later UI/release tasks should preserve and communicate that contract unless product direction changes.

verification_environment.verification_scope: focused domain-plus-regression tests followed by full npm run verify

node_package_scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run build

verification_environment.notes: A first full verify attempt surfaced a TypeScript noUnusedLocals error from an obsolete engine helper after the scoring refactor; the helper was removed and npm run verify was rerun to green before finalizing this report.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Maintain bullet, mountain, and mutual-whist values across successful/failed game contracts, misere, and progressive all-pass, while preserving directed whist matrix invariants.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/domain/scoring.ts; src/domain/scoring.test.ts; npm run test -- src/domain/scoring.test.ts src/domain/engine.test.ts
evidence_matrix.limitations: Evidence is deterministic local domain-test coverage rather than DOS binary equivalence proof.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Expose deterministic result data for deal settlement, bullet-target completion, and final settlement/ranking through engine state transitions.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/domain/engine.ts; src/domain/engine.test.ts; src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts; npm run test -- src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts
evidence_matrix.limitations: UI rendering of the richer score/result model remains in later US-844 UI tasks.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Deal completion updates the score table via settled bullet, mountain, and whist totals without mutating active scores before settleDeal.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/domain/engine.test.ts; src/domain/scoring.test.ts; npm run test -- src/domain/scoring.test.ts src/domain/engine.test.ts
evidence_matrix.limitations: Acceptance coverage here is domain-state evidence; visible score-table presentation is deferred to later UI work.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Bullet completion yields deterministic finished-state result data and prevents next-deal continuation.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/domain/engine.test.ts; src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts; npm run test -- src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts; npm run verify
evidence_matrix.limitations: Finished-state persistence suppression is exercised by the existing saveStore suite; UI final-result surface is still a follow-up task.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Implement whist and final-settlement behavior for SC-844-016 through SC-844-022 using the explicit MZ-401 MVP assumption set unless contradicted by Spexus refs.
evidence_matrix.limitations: This is a deliberate implementation contract for MVP, not a claim of reverse-engineered exact original formulas.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Updated runtime state shape remains compatible with save/load validation and migration behavior.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/persistence/saveStore.test.ts; npm run test -- src/persistence/saveStore.test.ts; npm run verify
evidence_matrix.limitations: No schema migration code change was required because the persistence validator already accepts extra state fields while preserving JSON payload contents.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Focused scope only; broader regression was still required.
Local deterministic integration flow only; no backend/live API applies to this static app.
This release-gate evidence covers current domain/test/build scope only; later UI score table/result tasks still need their own verification evidence.
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_risk: Whist/final-settlement formulas remain an MVP contract decision rather than DOS-authentic proof.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: PERSONAL-TASK-1154 scope; PERSONAL-EP-180 hierarchy; source inspection
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: No backend, auth, network, or sensitive data path exists in this task scope.
